metadata.title: Free Astrocartography Calculator with AI — Accurate Birth Map & Relocation Insights
metadata.description: Use a free astrocartography calculator powered by AI. Get precise planetary lines, relocation insights, and instant map interpretations. No signup, no ads — just accurate, AI-enhanced astrocartography.
metadata.keywords: free astrocartography calculator, AI astrocartography, astrocartography map online free, birth chart location map, astrocartography lines, relocation astrology tool, planetary lines calculator, astrocartography AI interpretation, accurate astrocartography chart, best free astrology map

ai_chat_history_page.title: AI chat history
ai_chat_history_page.pro_required: Upgrade to Professional to enable cloud history: auto-save chats, sync across devices, and review anytime (after enabling, your chat history will be stored and downloadable). Before enabling, we do not save your cloud chat history.

cityPopup.noHitsText: No nearby planetary lines detected (based on the distance threshold).
cityPopup.fallbackQuestion: Why is {city} one of the best places for me to live?

linePopup.subtitle: Line energy guidance
linePopup.question1Template: What does this line mean for me—especially through {shortDesc}?
linePopup.question2Template: How will the energy of {shortDesc} show up in my life?
linePopup.question3Template: What should I do to make the most of this {shortDesc} line?

askOther.cityPrefill:
Based on the nearby planetary lines around {city}, {country}, these energies are activated: 1) {shortDesc1} 2) {shortDesc2} 3) {shortDesc3}.
My Question :
askOther.linePrefill:
Your line of {planetSymbol} {planet} {lineTypeLabel} carries the energy of {shortDesc}.
My Question :

inlineResult.title: Your Astrocartography Map
inlineResult.calculationError: Unable to calculate the map. Please try again.
inlineResult.downloadError: Unable to download the map. Please try again.
inlineResult.interpretDescription: Check a city, compare places, then ask AI using the map evidence.
inlineResult.checkCityDescription: Review nearby planetary lines, distance, and strength.
inlineResult.compareCitiesDescription: Add 2–4 cities, choose a goal, and compare evidence.
quickQuestions: Should I move or stay, and which places fit me better?
Which cities support my career, money, and recognition?
Where should I move for love, friendship, and belonging?
Compare my current city with better places for home and wellbeing.

cityTools.checkTitle: Check a City Against Your Map
cityTools.checkDescription: Enter a real city to review nearby planetary lines, approximate distance, strength, and map evidence.
cityTools.compareDescription: Add 2–4 places, choose a goal, and compare calculated support, caution, and trade-offs side by side.
cityTools.noNearbyLines: No planetary line was found within the nearby threshold.
cityTools.askAI: Ask AI about this city evidence
cityTools.distanceNotice: Distances are approximate and describe proximity to the calculated planetary lines.
cityTools.decisionNotice: Line distance is decision-support context, not certainty. Consider birth-time accuracy, real-world planning, and your own experience.
cityTools.selectAtLeastTwo: Select at least two cities to compare.
cityTools.goalTitle: What goal are you comparing for?
cityTools.evidenceNotice: This comparison uses calculated line-distance evidence as decision-support context, not certainty.
cityTools.noEvidence: No close planetary line was detected within 800 km.
cityTools.cityAIPrompt:
Analyze {city}, {country} using the following astrocartography evidence. Separate supportive themes, cautions, and practical trade-offs; do not assume a closer line is automatically better.
{evidence}
cityTools.compareAIPrompt:
Compare these cities for relocation using only the supplied astrocartography evidence. My selected goal is {goal}. Explain support, caution, and trade-offs instead of declaring one universally best. Focus especially on this question: {focus}
{evidence}
cityTools.defaultAIFocus: Which city fits my selected goal best, why, and what trade-offs should I consider?
cityTools.comparisonSummary: For {goal}, {city} currently shows the clearest map support.
cityTools.rankingDisclaimer: This is a goal-specific signal ranking, not a claim that one city is best in every part of life.

statusHints.support: More aligned with your selected goal

cityTools.lockedDescription: Explore why the ranking formed, the main trade-offs between cities, and which option better fits your selected goal.

askHooks.whyFirst: Why does {city} rank first for my goal?
askHooks.keyDifference: What is the key difference between {first} and {second}?
askHooks.longTerm: Which city is better for long-term living rather than short-term growth?

cityTools.compareCTAHelp: The question is filled in first. Credits are only used when you send it in AI chat.

relationships.title: Relationships & belonging
relationships.description: Love, partnership, friends, and social ease

home.title: Home & emotional stability
home.description: Family, grounding, private life, and steadiness

travel.title: Travel & exploration

angles.AS: ASC brings this energy into identity, visibility, and how you begin life in a place.
angles.DS: DSC brings this energy into partners, attraction, clients, and one-to-one relationships.
angles.MC: MC brings this energy into career, reputation, ambition, and public life.
angles.IC: IC brings this energy into home, family, roots, privacy, and emotional foundations.

creativity_art.questionTemplate: Can {city} spark my creativity and sense of beauty?

happiness_confidence.questionTemplate: Where will I feel the happiest—and more confident—in {city}?

emotional_security_home.questionTemplate: Will {city} bring the emotional security and comfort my family needs?

stability_long_term.questionTemplate: Should I move to {city} and settle down for the rest of my life?

career_breakthrough.questionTemplate: Will {city} help me break through professionally?

drive_competition.questionTemplate: Will {city} boost my drive and competitive advantage?

communication_writing_learning.questionTemplate: Could {city} help me become a successful writer?

spirituality_counselling.questionTemplate: What if I study counselling or therapy in {city}?

change_innovation.questionTemplate: Will {city} bring unexpected changes and more freedom?

deep_transformation.questionTemplate: Will {city} change my life on a deep level?
